zh.Warmingham, Cheshire, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭爾瓦明加姆
zh.Warmingham, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾瓦明加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Mainwaring於1182年出生在英國英格蘭爾瓦明加姆時，他的父親Ralph De Mainwaring27歲，母親Amicia Meschines15歲。他於1205年之前與Christian de Buron結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。他去世於1250年在英國爾奧維 奧福享年68歲，埋葬在英國爾奧維 奧福。

zh-hans.Warmingham, Cheshire, England, United Ki: 英国英格兰爾瓦明加姆
zh-hans.Warmingham, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾瓦明加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Mainwaring于1182年出生在英国英格兰爾瓦明加姆时，他的父亲Ralph De Mainwaring27岁，母亲Amicia Meschines15岁。他于1205年之前与Christian de Buron结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。他去世于1250年在英国爾奧維 奧福享年68岁，埋葬在英国爾奧維 奧福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Mainwaring was born in 1182, in Warmingham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph De Mainwaring, was 27 and his mother, Amicia Meschines, was 15. He married Christian de Buron before 1205. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. He died in 1250, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Over Peover, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Mainwaring est né en 1182, à Warmingham, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph De Mainwaring, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Amicia Meschines, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Christian de Buron avant 1205. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Il est décédé en 1250, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Mainwaring 1182 in Warmingham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph De Mainwaring 27 und seine Mutter Amicia Meschines 15. Er hat vor 1205 Christian de Buron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Er starb 1250 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Over Peover, Cheshire, England und wurde in Over Peover, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Mainwaring è nato il nel 1182 nel Warmingham, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph De Mainwaring, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Amicia Meschines, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Christian de Buron prima del 1205. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì nel 1250, nel Over Peover, Cheshire, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Over Peover, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Mainwaringが1182年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーミンガムで生まれた時，父Ralph De Mainwaringは27歳，母Amicia Meschinesは15歳であった。1205年以前にChristian de Buronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼は1250年にイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで68歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Mainwaring(이)가 1182년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워밍함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph De Mainwaring(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Amicia Meschines(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1205년 이전 Christian de Buron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1250년 영국 체실르 버 p오버에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 버 p오버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Mainwaring nasceu em 1182, em Warmingham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph De Mainwaring, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Amicia Meschines, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Christian de Buron antes 1205. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1250, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Mainwaring родился в 1182 г. в местности вармингхам, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph De Mainwaring было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Amicia Meschines, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Christian de Buron перед 1205 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Он умер в 1250 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Mainwaring nació en 1182, en Warmingham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph De Mainwaring, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Amicia Meschines, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Christian de Buron antes de 1205. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió en 1250, en Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
